# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Instance"
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref MyAMI
      InstanceType: !FindInMap [AWSRegionArch2InstanceType, , !Ref AWS::Region, ]
      KeyName: !Ref MyKeyPair
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIPAddress: 'true'
          SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet
          Groups: [!Ref MySecurityGroup]
  MyEBSVolume:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Volume"
    Properties:
      Size: 10
      VolumeType: gp2
      AutoEnableIO: 'true'
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt [MyEC2Instance, AvailabilityZone]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEBSVolume
  MyEBSMountTarget:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::MountTarget"
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref MyFileSystem
      IpAddress: !Ref MyIPAddress
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet
